PROP-01b-partial3-inv-050.text: totalUsdValue for checkUpkeep includes balance in both FeeAggregator and auction contract.
PROP-01b-partial3-inv-050.assertion: forall checkUpkeep(asset): totalUsd = usdValue(balanceOf(feeAgg, asset) + balanceOf(auction, asset))

locations.note: lines 246-251: for live auctions, checks balanceOf(address(this)); lines 257-264: for new auctions, checks balanceOf(feeAggregator) — combined USD value determines eligibility and early-end detection
